caption: A screen recording displays a web browser open to a digital mind map or conceptual diagram. The diagram consists of various circular icons linked by blue lines against a dark background, featuring labels like "Human", "Nature", and "Infrastructure". A small video call window in the top right corner shows a man with a beard wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt. As the sequence progresses, the browser remains active with various tabs visible at the top, including one titled "True Learning by Systemantics". In the final stage, a bright, illustrated pop-up advertisement appears over the mind map, featuring colorful characters and the word "SALE" in large, bold, black letters. The man in the video window remains present throughout, observing the screen.
